title: Foo Bar Metric Definition Backfill
description: Fix a failed backfill of a new metric definition. The backfill job partially ran, left orphaned data, and the metric table has gaps or duplicates. Recover and complete the backfill idempotently.

tasks.description: Repair the metric backfill: remove partial/duplicate data, ensure idempotency, and backfill all historical dates correctly.

infrastructure.description: Postgres has source events. ClickHouse has analytics.metric_daily with partial/duplicate backfill data. Fix and complete the backfill.
